change_boundary.what_changed: Added AAES-OS architecture coding-agent contract, extended src/aaes_os/ with orchestrator, policy/invariant engines, ULS, Daniel module stub, trace store, HTTP routes, and architecture tests.
change_boundary.why_changed: Reconcile concise cognitive-agent rundown with RFC v1.0 governed-span implementation for MVP phases 1-4.
assumptions: Phase 4 SQLite and operator_decision_ledger bridge remain follow-on work.
HTTP routes mount on app/main.py without bearer token for MVP stub.
change_boundary.reversal: Remove architecture doc, new aaes_os modules, router mount, tests, and this manifest.

uncertainty.resolution_path: Wire operator_decision_ledger bridge when DECISION events must persist outside TraceStore.
